query:
-- ZAMBRERO BRABHAM (C1405): billing item 144 ($136.36) - service S0016 already has $136.36 revenue
-- S0016 is already matched. Link billing item 144 to S0016.
UPDATE billing_items SET serviceExternalId = 'S0016' WHERE id = 144;

-- MA PA ME (C0155): billing item 162 ($131.36) - service S1106 already has $131.36 revenue
-- S1106 is already matched. Link billing item 162 to S1106.
UPDATE billing_items SET serviceExternalId = 'S1106' WHERE id = 162;

-- ZAMBRERO WEST PINJARRA SOUTHBOUND (C0399): billing item 33171 ($92.53) - service S0008 (Core Internet $0 revenue)
UPDATE billing_items SET serviceExternalId = 'S0008' WHERE id = 33171;
UPDATE services SET monthlyRevenue = 92.53 WHERE externalId = 'S0008';

-- LITTLE CHA TUGGERAH (C0148): billing item 33172 ($75.49) - service S0278 (NBN Internet $0 revenue)
UPDATE billing_items SET serviceExternalId = 'S0278' WHERE id = 33172;
UPDATE services SET monthlyRevenue = 75.49 WHERE externalId = 'S0278';

-- ZAM MARRICKVILLE (C0295): billing item 33170 ($164.27) - no services with cost found
-- The services are all Vocus Mobile with $0 cost. This is a SmileTel bundle service not yet in DB.
-- Leave as unlinked for now - needs new service record.

-- TYS MOLENDINAR (C2599): billing item 33168 ($200.91) - no services found for C2599
-- The Yiros Shop Molendinar has no service records. Needs new service record.

-- COMPASS ASSURANCE (C0065): billing item 33174 ($500) - no services with cost found
-- Needs new service record (NBN EE 500mb).

-- NU-DEV (C0176): billing item 33181 ($399) - no services found
-- Needs new service record (TPG Fibre 400).

-- LEAD EDUCATION (C0135): billing item 33173 ($399) - service S0278 is for C0148 (Little Cha Tuggerah)
-- Lead Education has no services. Needs new service record.

-- JACK GREEN (C0125): billing item 33175 ($174.73) - one-off UPS equipment sale, not a recurring service
-- This is a hardware sale, not a recurring service. Should be excluded from recurring billing alerts.

-- Verify the fixes
SELECT bi.id, bi.contactName, bi.serviceExternalId, bi.lineAmount
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.id IN (144, 162, 33171, 33172, 33180, 33178, 33179, 33177, 33176, 7);
